dialogue_text: The wild calots, possibly, or worse,
source_excerpt: "The wild calots, possibly, or worse," he replied. "Unless I should chance to have the opportunity I have so long waited of battling with Tal Hajus."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: We will stay, Tars Tarkas, and see Tal Hajus tonight. You shall not sacrifice yourself, and it may be that tonight you can have the chance you wait.
